original_title: Sounds of Frequencies Vol.1 ❖ Sacred Frequencies ❖ Solfeggio & Binaural Healing Tones | Sonat Mundi
new_title: 528 Hz Solfeggio Frequencies ❖ Complete Healing Music ❖ Binaural Beats & Sacred Tones | Sonat Mundi
new_description:
🎵 Complete Solfeggio Frequencies Collection - 15 pure healing tones from 174 Hz to 963 Hz plus binaural beats for DNA repair, chakra healing and deep meditation.

Experience the most powerful healing frequencies including 528 Hz Love Frequency, 432 Hz Earth Resonance, and binaural beats for delta, theta, alpha and gamma brainwave states. Use headphones for maximum healing benefits.

❖ TRACKLIST:

00:00 - Foundation — 174 Hz
The lowest solfeggio frequency. Root Chakra grounding. Pure sine tone foundation with cave water resonance. Reduces pain, relieves stress, brings deep sense of safety and security.

05:12 - Cellular Repair — 285 Hz
Tissue regeneration frequency. Sacral Chakra support. Soft forest stream ambience. Influences energy fields, heals damaged tissue, supports cellular regeneration at quantum level.

11:10 - Liberation — 396 Hz
Root and Sacral Chakra liberator. Gentle distant thunder. Releases fear, guilt and grief. Turns grief into joy, liberates from subconscious negative beliefs.

17:04 - Transformation — 417 Hz
Sacral Chakra activator. Soft ocean waves. Facilitates change, clears traumatic experiences, cleanses negative energy from cells and environment.

25:03 - The Love Frequency — 528 Hz
Heart Chakra miracle tone. Birdsong at dawn. The most studied healing frequency — DNA repair, increased energy, clarity of mind, deep inner peace, awakened creativity.

30:46 - Connection — 639 Hz
Heart Chakra harmonizer. Gentle rain on leaves. Enhances communication, understanding, tolerance and love. Reconnects broken relationships, harmonizes family and community energy.

36:15 - Expression — 741 Hz
Throat Chakra awakener. Wind through pine forest. Awakens intuition and creative expression. Cleanses cells from toxins, electromagnetic radiation and viral infections.

41:21 - Return — 852 Hz
Third Eye Chakra activator. Distant temple bells. Returns the soul to spiritual order. Awakens intuition, raises cellular energy, opens communication with higher self.

47:22 - Divine — 963 Hz
Crown Chakra and pineal gland activation. Cosmic silence with resonance. The frequency of divine consciousness — awakens perfect state, enables non-vibrational experiences, connects to universal oneness.

55:21 - Earth Resonance — 432 Hz
Universal natural tuning, Schumann Resonance alignment. Mountain wind. Mathematical tuning of the universe — connects to nature, reduces anxiety, opens the heart, aligns with cosmic vibration.

1:02:24 - Binaural Delta — 2 Hz
Deep sleep and healing brainwave state. Night forest ambience. Delta waves promote deepest sleep, cellular regeneration, immune system boost, unconscious healing. Use headphones.

1:09:02 - Binaural Theta — 6 Hz
Deep meditation and creativity brainwave state. Gentle stream. Theta waves connect to subconscious mind, enhance intuition, creativity and emotional healing. Use headphones.

1:13:56 - Binaural Alpha — 10 Hz
Relaxed awareness brainwave state. Soft breeze and birds. Alpha waves promote calm focus, stress relief, positive thinking and light meditation. Use headphones.

1:19:50 - Binaural Gamma — 40 Hz
Peak consciousness and cognitive enhancement. Subtle cosmic hum. Gamma waves associated with heightened awareness, memory formation, peak mental performance and spiritual insight. Use headphones.

1:25:25 - The Complete Spectrum — All Frequencies
All 9 solfeggio frequencies layered in harmonic unity. Full nature tapestry. The complete healing journey — 174, 285, 396, 417, 528, 639, 741, 852, 963 Hz unified in one transcendent composition.

❖ Healing Properties by Frequency:
174 Hz — Pain relief, stress reduction, grounding
285 Hz — Cellular regeneration, tissue healing
396 Hz — Fear and guilt release, liberation
417 Hz — Trauma clearing, transformation
528 Hz — DNA repair, love, inner peace
639 Hz — Relationship harmony, communication
741 Hz — Detoxification, creative expression
852 Hz — Spiritual awakening, intuition
963 Hz — Divine consciousness, unity
432 Hz — Natural alignment, heart opening
Binaural Delta — Deep sleep, immune healing
Binaural Theta — Meditation, creativity
Binaural Alpha — Calm focus, stress relief
Binaural Gamma — Peak consciousness, clarity

❖ Recommended Use:
Use headphones for binaural tracks (tracks 11-14)
Find a comfortable position — sitting or lying down

Allow the frequencies to work naturally
Drink water after each session

original_title: Sounds of Moods Vol.1 ✦ The Human Spectrum ✦ 15 Pure Instrumental Journeys | Sonat Mundi
new_title: Emotional Healing Music ✦ 15 Pure Instrumental Tracks ✦ Piano, Cello & Strings | Sonat Mundi
new_description:
🎼 Pure Emotional Healing Music - Journey through 15 instrumental compositions mapping the complete human emotional spectrum from hope to stillness with piano, cello, strings and ambient textures.

Experience every shade of human emotion through crystal clear instrumental music perfect for meditation, therapy, emotional release and inner healing work.

This is The Human Spectrum.

From the gentle hope of First Light to the absolute peace of Stillness — 15 pure instrumental compositions, each one a different shade of what it means to feel alive.

No words. No noise. Just sound — and what it awakens in you.

This album has been called many things:
One Day, Every Feeling — because every emotion here lives in a single day.
The Inner Atlas — because it maps the landscapes we carry inside.
From First Light to Stillness — because that is exactly the journey.

We simply call it: The Human Spectrum.

✦ TRACKLIST:
00:00 - First Light — Piano, strings
05:09 - Quiet Storm — Piano, minor key
10:09 - Floating — Synth pads, ambient textures
14:56 - Nostalgia — Vintage piano, strings
18:19 - Euphoria — Strings, orchestral
21:57 - Solitude — Solo piano
27:11 - Longing — Cello, expressive melody
33:07 - Wonder — Marimba, strings, sparkling textures
38:21 - Surrender — Ambient drone, deep tones
44:10 - Rage — Percussion, dark strings, brass
47:22 - Tenderness — Acoustic guitar, fingerpicking
51:38 - Courage — Brass, strings, steady rhythm
56:44 - Grief — Cello, piano, minor key
1:02:15 - Ecstasy — Full strings, orchestral climax
1:06:32 - Stillness — Minimal ambient, pure silence

✦ Every instrument is pure and clean:
Piano · Strings · Cello · Guitar · Brass · Marimba · Synth · Ambient Textures
No background noise · No static · Crystal clear audio

✦ Perfect for:
Meditation and inner work · Processing difficult emotions · Celebrating quiet moments · Reading and reflection · Late night emotional release · Therapy and healing · Creative work · Morning intention setting

original_title: Sounds of World Vol.1 ❆ Ancient Silk Road ❆ 15 Tracks of Authentic World Music | Sonat Mundi
new_title: Silk Road World Music ❆ 15 Authentic Traditional Instruments ❆ Asia, Persia & Beyond | Sonat Mundi
new_description:
🌏 Authentic Silk Road World Music - Journey through 15 traditional compositions featuring sitar, oud, koto, flamenco guitar, Tibetan bowls and 20+ authentic instruments from Asia, Persia and beyond.

Experience living musical traditions from Anatolia to Tibet, Mongolia to Andalusia with authentic scales, traditional techniques and cultural storytelling through pure instrumental music.

A sonic journey through the Ancient Silk Road — 15 authentic world music compositions, each rooted in the living traditions of its homeland. From the mystical plains of Anatolia to the sacred temples of Tibet, from the Flamenco courts of Andalusia to the vast Mongolian steppe — this is music that remembers.

❆ TRACKLIST:
00:00 - Anatolian Dawn — Ney flute, Sufi Makam scales, microtonal woodwind textures, sunrise atmosphere
04:00 - Samarkand Caravanserai — Tanbur and Dutar melodies, Doyra percussion, Central Asian folk scales
08:00 - Hafiz's Secret — Santur hammered dulcimer with fast tremolos, Dastgah scales, soft Tombak rhythm
12:00 - The Spirit of Tengri — Khöömei throat singing drones, Morin Khuur horsehead fiddle, vast steppe atmosphere
16:00 - Duduk's Lament — Double-reed Duduk woodwind, traditional drone accompaniment, Armenian folk melody
20:00 - Andalusian Twilight — Flamenco guitar fingerpicking, Moorish Oud fusion, Cajon drum, Phrygian dominant scales
24:00 - Kyoto Moon — Koto 13-string zither plucking, Shakuhachi flute with traditional vibrato, Pentatonic scales
28:00 - Himalayan Silence — Tibetan Singing Bowls, long sustain, Dungchen long horn drones, spiritual temple atmosphere
32:00 - Varanasi Morning — Sitar improvisation, Tabla drums, Tanpura drone, authentic Indian Raga scales
36:00 - Tuareg Fire — Tishoumaren desert blues guitar, hypnotic Tinariwen rhythms, tribal hand claps
40:00 - Byzantine Echoes — Ancient Lyre plucking, Byzantine chant textures, stone cathedral acoustics, Phrygian mode
44:00 - Balkan Soul — Kaval flute, odd-meter 7/8 Balkan rhythms, Accordion swells, traditional folk soul
48:00 - Mesopotamian Wind — Qanun zither with delicate ornamentation, Bendir frame drum, Tigris river atmosphere
52:00 - The Weaver's Song — Pipa lute plucking, Guzheng glissandos, ancient Chinese silk-making folk rhythm
56:00 - Global Silk Road — Oud, Sitar and Ney fusion, world instruments meeting in harmony, epic cultural finale

❆ Instruments featured:
Ney · Oud · Sitar · Koto · Shakuhachi · Santur · Tanbur · Dutar · Doyra · Morin Khuur · Duduk · Flamenco Guitar · Cajon · Tibetan Singing Bowls · Dungchen · Tabla · Tanpura · Qanun · Bendir · Pipa · Guzheng · Kaval · Accordion · Lyre

❆ Cultures & Traditions:
Anatolia · Uzbekistan · Persia · Mongolia · Armenia · Andalusia · Japan · Tibet · India · Sahara · Byzantine Greece · Balkans · Mesopotamia · China · Global Fusion

Subscribe for weekly authentic world music from all 195 nations and their living traditions.

original_title: Sounds of Concepts Vol.1 ✦ Study Music ✦ 12 Tracks for Deep Focus & Concentration | Sonat Mundi
new_title: Deep Focus Study Music ✦ 12 Hour Concentration ✦ Piano, Jazz & Ambient Soundscapes | Sonat Mundi
new_description:
📚 Deep Focus Study Music - 12 carefully crafted instrumental tracks featuring piano, jazz and ambient soundscapes designed to enhance concentration, boost productivity and create the perfect study atmosphere.

Transform your study sessions with music scientifically designed for deep focus, from morning piano clarity to midnight creative flow - perfect for studying, coding, reading and deep work.

A carefully crafted 12-track sonic journey designed to enhance your focus, boost productivity, and create the perfect study atmosphere. Each track carries its own unique world — from the warmth of a morning piano to the stillness of a Himalayan bowl, from a rainy night in Tokyo to the electric pulse of a city at 2am.

Whether you are studying, working, reading, coding or simply need to enter a state of deep flow — let these sounds guide your mind.

✦ TRACKLIST:
00:00 - Morning Clarity — A gentle piano awakening to start your session with fresh eyes and an open mind.
04:00 - Café Thoughts — Warm acoustic jazz tones, the sound of a busy café fading into pure concentration.
08:00 - Wooden Strings — Intimate fingerpicked guitar, close and warm, like studying by a fireplace.
12:00 - Vienna Library — Soft chamber strings echoing through high ceilings and old books.
16:00 - Forest Rain — Nature and synth intertwine, the rhythm of raindrops becoming your metronome.
20:00 - Kyoto Stillness — Japanese koto and silence, the art of doing one thing at a time.
24:00 - Neural Drift — Electronic ambient pulses that sync with your brain's focus frequencies.
28:00 - Nordic Frost — Cold, clear, minimal. Like thinking in an empty white room.
32:00 - The Reading Room — Soft organ and classical piano, timeless and unhurried.
36:00 - Himalayan Focus — Singing bowls and drone, ancient tools for modern concentration.
40:00 - Midnight Pages — Rain, jazz, lamp light. The world is asleep. You are writing.
44:00 - City Glow — Minimal synth and city pulse. The late night belongs to those who create.

✦ Perfect for:
📚 Studying & Homework
💻 Deep Work & Coding
📖 Reading & Writing
🎯 Focus & Concentration
☕ Coffee Shop Atmosphere
🌙 Late Night Sessions
🎨 Creative Work
🧠 Brain Training

Subscribe for weekly study music and focus soundscapes that enhance your productivity and mental clarity.
